name: TheMaven, Inc.
summary: TheMaven, Inc. engages in software development and other operational activities. The company develops a proprietary online publishing platform that provides channel partners the ability to produce and manage editorially focused content and community interaction through tools and services; and proprietary advertising technology, techniques, and relationships that allow its channel partners to monetize online editorially focused content through various display and custom content advertising solutions and services. It also develops and operates a coalition of network of professionally managed online media channels on third party cloud platforms and data center hosting facilities. The company's channel partners publishes content and oversee an online community for its channels and leverages its proprietary technology platform to engage the collective audiences within a single network. Its channel partner joins the media-coalition by invitation-only and is drawn from premium media brands, professional journalists, subject matter experts, and social leaders. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in New York, New York.
